completion_promises.criterion_text: tests/test_adapters_llamaswap.py — default stub: LlamaSwapAdapter(base_url="http://stub").get_status("jarvis-reasoner") returns SwapStatus(loaded_model="jarvis-reasoner", eta_seconds=0, source="stub").
completion_promises.evidence: TestDefaultStubReturnsLoadedSnapshot.test_default_get_status_returns_eta_zero_stub_source_for_reasoner_alias asserts adapter.get_status('jarvis-reasoner') == SwapStatus(loaded_model='jarvis-reasoner', eta_seconds=0, source='stub'). Constant _STUB_BASE_URL='http://stub' and _REASONER_ALIAS='jarvis-reasoner' match the AC verbatim.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Same file — degraded stub: _stub_response callable returning SwapStatus(loaded_model="jarvis-reasoner", eta_seconds=180, source="stub") flows through unchanged (boundary for >30s-ETA branch).
completion_promises.evidence: TestDegradedStubForwardedUnchanged.test_degraded_stub_callable_eta_180_flows_through_unchanged constructs LlamaSwapAdapter with _stub_response=lambda _alias: degraded where degraded is SwapStatus(loaded_model='jarvis-reasoner', eta_seconds=180, source='stub'), then asserts the returned value equals the input verbatim (loaded_model, eta_seconds=180, source='stub' all preserved). A second test (test_degraded_stub_alias_is_forwarded_to_callable) confirms the alias is passed to the callable.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Same file — negative ETA rejected at model level: SwapStatus(loaded_model="x", eta_seconds=-1) raises ValidationError (scenario: Swap status enforces a non-negative ETA).
completion_promises.evidence: TestNegativeEtaRejectedAtModelLevel.test_construct_swapstatus_with_negative_eta_raises_validation_error wraps SwapStatus(loaded_model='x', eta_seconds=-1) in pytest.raises(ValidationError). A second test inspects exc_info.value.errors() and asserts the offending field path is ('eta_seconds',).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Same file — idempotency: three successive calls to get_status("jarvis-reasoner") return equivalent SwapStatus instances; no internal counter mutated (scenario: Repeated swap-status reads for the same alias return consistent results).
completion_promises.evidence: TestIdempotentReadsForSameAlias has three tests: (1) test_three_successive_default_reads_for_reasoner_alias_are_equivalent runs adapter.get_status('jarvis-reasoner') three times and asserts first == second == third; (2) test_three_successive_reads_do_not_mutate_internal_state snapshots adapter.__dict__ before and after and asserts equality (no internal counter mutation); (3) test_three_successive_reads_each_have_eta_zero confirms each snapshot still has eta_seconds=0.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Same file — source marker: default stub returns source="stub" (scenario: The llama-swap adapter reports a stub source in Phase 2).
completion_promises.evidence: TestDefaultStubSourceMarker has two tests: test_default_stub_source_marker_is_stub asserts adapter.get_status('jarvis-reasoner').source == 'stub'; test_default_stub_source_is_stub_for_arbitrary_alias loops over three aliases (jarvis-reasoner, qwen3-coder, some-future-alias) and asserts source == 'stub' for each, demonstrating the marker is alias-independent.

completion_promises.criterion_text: tests/test_swap_aware_voice_ack.py — parametrised ETA boundary table: (0, reachy, False), (30, reachy, False), (31, reachy, True), (240, reachy, True), (240, cli, False — non-voice adapter never gets ack).
completion_promises.evidence: TestEtaBoundaryTable.test_should_emit_voice_ack_matches_acceptance_table is parametrised over _BOUNDARY_TABLE which contains exactly the 5 AC rows: pytest.param(0,'reachy',False), (30,'reachy',False), (31,'reachy',True), (240,'reachy',True), (240,'cli',False). It asserts should_emit_voice_ack(adapter_id, status) is expected_emit_ack. A parallel test test_emit_voice_ack_and_queue_emitted_flag_matches_table runs the same table against emit_voice_ack_and_queue and asserts outcome.emitted matches. Sanity-check tests pin VOICE_ACK_ETA_THRESHOLD_SECONDS == 30 and DEFAULT_VOICE_REACTIVE_ADAPTER_IDS == frozenset({'reachy'}).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Same file — when emit_ack=True on a voice-reactive session, the supervisor state captures a 'queued for dispatch once swap completes' marker; no audio I/O in test (stub TTS hook).
completion_promises.evidence: TestQueuedForDispatchMarkerOnVoiceReactiveSession has six tests covering: (a) emit_voice_ack_and_queue('reachy', SwapStatus(eta=240)) returns VoiceAckOutcome(emitted=True, queued=True); (b) outcome is a VoiceAckOutcome instance; (c) outcome.ack_text equals VOICE_ACK_TTS_TEXT and is non-empty; (d) emit_ack=False path returns queued=False, ack_text=None; (e) cli adapter at ETA=240 returns queued=False; (f) input SwapStatus is not mutated. TestNoAudioOrNetworkIoFromVoiceAckPolicy adds three further hygiene tests asserting the helper returns only a bool / dataclass (no audio sink touched, no network call) and that overrides do not mutate the module-level default set. The TTS hook is implicitly stubbed because Phase 2 emit_voice_ack_and_queue only returns the outcome — it does not synthesize audio.

completion_promises.criterion_text: No network I/O; no live provider calls.
completion_promises.evidence: Both test files import only jarvis.adapters.llamaswap, jarvis.adapters.types, and jarvis.infrastructure.lifecycle. The Phase 2 LlamaSwapAdapter is documented to perform no I/O at import or runtime (covered by sibling test_llamaswap_adapter.py AC-006). The voice-ack helpers are pure functions returning bool / VoiceAckOutcome. No httpx / requests / openai client / TTS sink is constructed anywhere in either file. pytest run completed in 0.42s, consistent with no network I/O.

The two test files cover their target subjects fully; the remaining lifecycle module lines (build_app_state at 331-450 and shutdown at 466-478) are out of scope for TASK-J003-019 and are covered by sibling test_lifecycle_startup_phase3.py — combined run yields lifecycle 84% / total 87% across the relevant modules.
